archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) combined with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast Data Authority). Deep, moody, and elite.
tone: Sleek, modern, elegant, elite, reassuring. Never panic-inducing.

rules: Overlines MUST be uppercase and wide tracking-[0.2em].

surfaces.card: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg hover:border-zinc-700 transition-all duration-300
surfaces.button_primary: bg-sky-500 hover:bg-sky-400 text-zinc-950 font-medium rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-all
surfaces.badge: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider border

layout_spacing.bento_grid: Grid Layout Technical Rules: Use 'The Control Room' Grid style for Risk Assessment Dashboard.
rules: Generous spacing: use 2x padding inside containers.
Grid items must be direct children.

components.map_view: Map should act as the full-screen background layer. UI overlays must use 'glass_panel' surface to float above it.
components.ai_chat: Implement as a floating bottom sheet or modal. Use the provided dark abstract orb as the AI avatar. Add a subtle pulsing glow effect: `shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(56,189,248,0.3)]`.
components.calendar_integration: List view of upcoming events. Each event card shows a safety pill (safe/warning/danger).
components.dashboard: Bento Grid layout displaying analytics on shootings. Use Recharts with dark mode colors (Rose, Amber, Emerald, Sky).
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (regular or thin weight) for an elegant line-art feel.

ai_avatar.description: Dark abstract orb with glowing rings - Use as the avatar for the Agentic Safeguard AI.

map_background.description: Aerial view of city buildings during night time - Use as the underlying map layer or splash screen background if real map is not rendering.

city_skyline.description: Wooden bridge with NYC skyline in the background - Use for dashboard hero sections or empty state backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building 'Agentic Safeguard', a high-end mobile app UI in React.
Since the target is mobile-first, build a layout that restricts maximum width on desktop (e.g., `max-w-md mx-auto h-screen relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-950`) to simulate a mobile app frame.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text via Google Fonts. Make sure to apply `tracking-tight` on all headings.
For the Interactive Map view, use the `map_background` image as an absolutely positioned background, with UI elements floating over it using the `glass_panel` class.
The AI Agent MUST feel elite and helpful. Use the `ai_avatar` for the chat head/avatar.
Integrate Shadcn primitives heavily customized to match the dark glassmorphism aesthetic. All overlays must use `backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/60 border border-white/10`.
Data-testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="ai-chat-button"`).
Please install: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts lucide-react framer-motion`.
